title: Parkland's Burnaby Refinery becomes the First to Successfully Produce Low Carbon Aviation Fuel in Canada
content: Parkland announced it has successfully produced Canada's first batch of low carbon aviation fuel at its Burnaby Refinery. Using existing infrastructure, Parklandâ€™s Burnaby Refinery has successfully produced approximately 101,000 litres of low carbon aviation fuel by using non-food grade canola and tallow as core feedstocks. With appropriate certification across the full supply chain, low carbon aviation fuel (LCAF) could be classified as sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). This batch of fuel has been purchased by Air Canada.
author: Analysts Account
